song.title: Softly and Tenderly Jesus is Calling
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Softly and tenderly Jesus is calling, Calling for you and for me; Patiently Jesus is waiting and watching, Watching for you and for me!
[C] Chorus Come home! come home! Ye who are weary, come home! Earnestly, tenderly, Jesus is calling, Calling, O sinner, come home!
[V2] 2) Why should we tarry When Jesus is pleading, Pleading for you and for me? Why should we linger And heed not His mercies, Mercies for you and for me?
[V3] 3) Time is now fleeting, The moments are passing, Passing from you and from me; Shadows are gathering, Deathbeds are coming, Coming for you and for me!
[V4] 4) Oh, for the wonderful Love He has promised, Promised for you and for me! Though we have sinned, He has mercy and pardon, Pardon for you and for me!
song.author: Will L. Thompson
